step_rationale: Early-onset MI marker; immune regulation role suggests systemic inflammatory component.
mechanism: Pregnancy zone protein functions as an immune regulator and acute-phase marker in early-onset myocardial infarction.

references.title: Screening and Identification of Pregnancy Zone Protein and Leucine-Rich Alpha-2-Glycoprotein as Potential Serum Biomarkers for Early-Onset Myocardial Infarction using Protein Profile Analysis.
